user.title: SmartThings OAuth Credentials
user.description:
Enter your SmartThings OAuth client ID and secret.

You can create these at the [Samsung Developer Workspace]({oauth_url}).

Create a new project → select 'Partner managed OAuth2' → set the redirect URI to `https://api.smartthings.com/oauth/callback`.

authorize.title: Authorize with SmartThings
authorize.description:
1. Open this URL in your browser:

`{auth_url}`

2. Log in with your Samsung account and authorize the app.
3. You'll be redirected — copy the `code` parameter from the URL.
4. Paste it below.

device.title: Select Your Soundbar
device.description: Choose the soundbar to integrate and set the maximum volume for the slider.

error.invalid_auth_code: Invalid authorization code. Please try again.

abort.no_devices: No compatible devices found on your SmartThings account.

init.title: Feature Toggles
init.description: Enable or disable feature groups. Disabling a feature skips its API polling, reducing load.

data.enable_advanced_audio: Advanced Audio switches (Night Mode, Voice Amp, Bass Boost, etc.)

set_speaker_level.name: Set Speaker Level
set_speaker_level.description: Adjust the volume of an individual speaker channel.

set_rear_speaker_mode.name: Set Rear Speaker Mode
set_rear_speaker_mode.description: Switch rear speakers between front and rear positioning.
